Emde Layout Demos › Green Goods › Bamboo Travel Mug

Bamboo Travel Mug

A beautifully crafted double-walled travel mug made from sustainably sourced bamboo. Keeps your coffee hot for 6 hours and cold drinks chilled for 12.

  • Capacity: 350ml
  • Material: Organic bamboo + stainless steel inner
  • Dishwasher safe (hand wash recommended)
  • BPA-free silicone lid
$34.00
